title: ML-KEM Overview and FIPS 203 Introduction
description: Comprehensive introduction to ML-KEM (Module-Lattice Key Encapsulation Mechanism), the primary post-quantum key exchange standard defined in FIPS 203.
learningObjectives: Understand what a Key Encapsulation Mechanism (KEM) is and why it's used
Explain ML-KEM's role in post-quantum cryptography
Identify the key components and operations of ML-KEM
Describe the relationship between ML-KEM and CRYSTALS-Kyber
Recognize appropriate use cases for ML-KEM
